summary: Verified all 5 fixes for Finance Center licensee view. Backend: quarterly compounding correctly implemented - lot_size and daily_profit are fixed per quarter (2.66 and $39.90 for Q1 2026 with $2611.10 starting balance). Balance never drops on consecutive days. Frontend: Monthly Summary shows 2 cards (Monthly Target, Current Profit) for licensees with Total Commission hidden. Current Profit correctly sums profits from days where managerTraded === true.

test_results.backend_quarterly_compounding: VERIFIED - lot_size (2.66) and daily_profit ($39.90) are fixed for entire Q1 2026
test_results.backend_no_balance_drops: VERIFIED - Balance never drops on consecutive days (0 drops found)
test_results.backend_balance_increases_when_traded: VERIFIED - Balance increases by daily_profit when manager_traded=true
test_results.frontend_2_column_layout: VERIFIED - Monthly Summary shows grid-cols-2 for licensees
test_results.frontend_total_commission_hidden: VERIFIED - Total Commission card not visible for licensees
test_results.frontend_monthly_target_visible: VERIFIED - Monthly Target card shows $758.23 for January 2026
test_results.frontend_current_profit_visible: VERIFIED - Current Profit card shows $0.00 (correct - no trades in Jan 2026 yet)
test_results.frontend_manager_traded_column: VERIFIED - Manager Traded column visible with toggle switches

context_for_next_testing_agent: All quarterly compounding and licensee view fixes verified. Backend fix in server.py lines 3805-3875 implements quarterly compounding - lot_size and daily_profit are calculated once at quarter start and remain fixed for the entire quarter. Frontend fix in ProfitTrackerPage.jsx lines 2796-2843 shows 2-column grid for licensees (hiding Total Commission). Current Profit calculation correctly filters days where managerTraded === true. The test licensee (Ryan TEST) has effective_start_date of 2025-01-15 with starting_amount of $2611.10.
